summary: Comprehensive testing completed for Telegram Geo-Radar MiniApp. All backend APIs are functional with 100% success rate. Frontend MiniApp loads correctly with working navigation and map functionality.

design_issues.issue: Report page lacks form elements for signal creation - relies on FAB button

passed_tests: GET /api/geo/health - API health check returns correct module info
GET /api/geo/map - Returns signal data with proper format
POST /api/geo/miniapp/report - Signal creation successful with proper response
GET /api/geo/miniapp/user/{id}/profile - User profile creation and retrieval working
Map displays with signals visible on Kyiv map
Bottom navigation with 4 tabs (Радар, Сигнал, Алерти, Профіль) working
All 4 navigation tabs clickable and functional
Floating Action Button (+) present and clickable
Responsive design works on mobile viewport (390x844)
No JavaScript errors or console errors detected
